title: Loctite Glue Remover Gel Tube 5g LOCGRGEL
description: Loctite Glue Remover for the removal of superglue and many other glues from badly bonded objects, stained surfaces, fabric and accidentally bonded fingers. Has a non-drip formula that is clean, quick and easy. Ideal for badly bonded items, accidental spillage, ink-marker stain remover and freeing bonded skin. Size: 5g Size:5g Brand:Loctite Category:Superglue Removers Height:163mm Width:17mm Depth:96mm Weight:0.03kg MPN:1623766

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Remove Glue, Stains, Correct Bad Bonds
